name: saga
description: Workflow orchestrator for agentic coding sessions — weaves the knowledge tool (Norn) and the work tool (Mimir) into one coherent session, end to end.

interface.shortDescription: Weaves knowledge and work into one coherent agentic coding session
interface.longDescription: Saga runs a coherent working Session: it assembles a Session Primer at start, routes the work, memorializes a Session Log at work boundaries, and consolidates durable knowledge — threading the knowledge (Norn) and work (Mimir) tools into and out of the session.
defaultPrompt: Let's pick up where we left off.
